note: A1 :identity pane (roster|detail @0.5): the LEFT principal roster renders text rows (left_wall edge_energy >= the principled text-present floor 1.0, distinct from a blank region's ~0), the center spans into the focused principal's identity contract (entity_core), and the frame stays dark-theme (entity_core luma <= 120).
